title: Match Timeline and Workload Widget View
excerpt: When viewing a Timeline and Workload Widget together, it would be useful to be able to link them so that the zoom would be the same in both and when you move the calendar along in one, it would move the calendar in the o…

posts.author: Feastie (Phil Scholefield)
posts.cookedHtml:
When viewing a Timeline and Workload Widget together, it would be useful to be able to link them so that the zoom would be the same in both and when you move the calendar along in one, it would move the calendar in the other, keeping the same period in view for both?
At the very least, the zoom level should match. Currently, if you show weeks in Timeline, zooming out to max, it is still slightly larger than the week view in the Workload Widget.
